category_sources: source_facts.description: convert JSON to HJSON and vice versa; official Hjson site describes Hjson as a user interface for JSON.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is hjson.github.io; official site uses the Hjson name.
docs_sources: Official Hjson site is the primary documentation surface; official RFC page documents the format.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/hjson/hjson-go; per instructions repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies JSON/HJSON conversion; official Hjson site and RFC describe the human-friendly JSON format.
